arts.ttl: Newcastle see Chelsea find another PSR loophole as Howe concerns remain true
arts.sum: Howe is not alone in questioning the current rules - and Chelsea's latest loophole again calls into question how such financial moves can be allowed at present. "I felt really uncomfortable in the summer when we were forced to make sales of two really talented young players in Elliot Anderson and Yankuba Minteh, against our will really for financial reasons," Howe told reporters in December.

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed

arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe has provided an injury update on Anthony Gordon ahead of Wednesday’s Premier League clash with Brentford at St. James’ Park. arts.sum: Newcastle United's top-four rivals Manchester City have been dealt a major injury blow with Premier League football set to return. With Premier League football set to return, Man City have been handed a major injury blow ahead of the season's run-in.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United owners' vow is bad news for rivals amid 'game-changing' PSR wish
arts.sum: Yet it is not a coincidence that Newcastle have finished each of the previous three campaigns strongly and it was just a couple of years ago that Howe's team won nine of their final 14 games to qualify for the Champions League. After all, there is still so much to play for in the final months of the campaign with an extra Champions League spot set to be up for grabs for the side who finish in fifth place in the top-flight.

arts.ttl: Newcastle injury news: Eddie Howe delivers Sven Botman, Anthony Gordon update before Brentford clash
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe provides an injury update on Sven Botman and Anthony Gordon ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash with Brentford.

arts.ttl: Howe urges Newcastle to switch focus and seal Champions League return
arts.sum: Home form ‘scratchy’ as Brentford visit on Wednesday Fabian Schär set to sign a new contract ‘imminently’ Eddie Howe has challenged his Newcastle players to prove they are not merely a cup team by overcoming their sometimes self-destructive inconsistency and qualifying for the Champions League. Howe’s side have always been capable of beating anyone on their day – highlighted as they overcame Liverpool at Wembley to lift the Carabao Cup last month – but their capacity for off days threatens the club’s ambition of the top-five finish that would almost certainly secure admission to Europe’s showpiece competition. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: “No feelings of revenge” – Player insists he’s not angry at Newcastle, experience made him stronger
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest star Matz Sels has insisted he has no feelings of revenge towards Newcastle United, as he tries to beat them to the Champions League. Het Niuewsblad have comments from the Nottingham Forest goalkeeper today as he continues to shine this season and push the club towards the European promised land.
